title: Forensic Accountant Rate Guide 2026
subtitle: Benchmark CFF Hourly Rates Across All US Markets
description: Get 2026 pricing data on CFF-credentialed forensic accountants. Benchmark expert witness rates by region, experience level, and service type to make informed budget and settlement decisions.
bullets: 50-state breakdown shows regional rate variations by expertise
Hourly, flat fee, and retainer pricing models explained
Budget expert witness costs before engagement negotiations begin

title: Forensic Accountant Vetting Guide
subtitle: Vet CFF-credentialed experts by case type and trial experience
description: Learn what credentials matter, which case types align with expertise, and how to screen for trial readiness. Protect your case—and your budget—by vetting before engagement.
bullets: Verify CFF, CFE, and relevant state accounting board credentials
Review deposition transcripts and courtroom testimony experience before retention
Match expertise to case type: fraud, asset valuation, damages
Compare hourly rates, retainer minimums, and malpractice insurance coverage

title: Forensic Accounting Engagement Checklist
subtitle: Structure forensic engagements that withstand discovery and trial
description: Whether preparing for trial or investigating a claim, forensic accounting engagements require clear scope, timelines, and deliverables. This checklist guides attorneys and insurers through essential steps for a defensible, court-ready analysis.
bullets: Define scope before hourly fees exceed litigation budget
Verify CFF credentials and expert report standards upfront
Map data collection and expert witness timeline early
Prepare for discovery, deposition, and testimony demands
